floor.prompt: Wooden office floor tile, warm brown tones, subtle plank grain pattern

wall.prompt: Office wall tile, light grey with subtle texture, clean interior look

plant.prompt: Small potted office plant, green leaves, terracotta pot, top-down view

rug.prompt: Cozy area rug, warm red and gold pattern, soft texture

layers.ground: Floor tiles covering the entire grid interior
layers.walls: Walls around the perimeter (row 0, row 21, col 0, col 39)
layers.furniture: Desks, chairs, tables, and other objects placed per area definitions
